name: Md. Tanvir Hossain
bio: As the driving force behind BPSTI, our CEO is committed to transforming vocational training in Bangladesh. With a focus on industrial innovation and global partnerships, they ensure that every student has a direct pathway to 4-star hotel environments and international employment.

name: Md. Farhan Ahmed
bio: Overseeing the day-to-day excellence of our training facilities, the Director of Operations ensures that our Active Learning labs and internship programs meet the highest professional standards of the hospitality industry.

name: Md. Rakibul Islam
bio: Specialized in global mobility, our Head of International Relations manages our language integration programs and coordinates overseas job placements for students looking to build careers in Europe and the Middle East.

name: Mr. Ariful Islam
bio: The bridge between our students and the industry. Our Head of Career Placement personally manages our relationships with 3 and 4-star hotels like Pan Pacific Sonargaon, InterContinental, and Radisson Blu, ensuring that every internship and job placement aligns with our students' career goals.

name: Ms. Sadia Sultana
bio: Responsible for keeping our training programs at the cutting edge. Our Director of Academic Excellence ensures that our course segments; from the Big 5 fast food mastery to International Cuisine; exceed the pedagogical standards required for global professional certification.

name: Mr. Kamal Hossain
bio: Dedicated to the journey of the individual. Our Student Success Coordinator oversees student support, from the initial enrollment in our fast-track programs to the successful transition into overseas language training and international career roles.
